method.en: From this level's entrances/exits on the source wiki.
method.fr: D'après les entrées/sorties de ce niveau sur le wiki source.

en.name: Level 45 — Abyss Inc.
en.shortDescription: An inky void holding 33 weightless skyscrapers arranged around a central Empire State replica — HQ of the Backrooms Research Consortium.
en.atmosphere: An otherworldly expanse of floating office towers in absolute darkness, lit by bioluminescent creatures and the glow of live buildings.
en.tips: All furnishings are non-functional Styrofoam. Fire escapes link the buildings. Avoid the outer towers — frequent blackouts and dense entities.
